tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs (github_pull_requests {:state "open"}))

(def filtered-prs 
  (filter (fn [pr] 
             (and (> (:additions pr) 400) 
                  (nil? (:closes_linear pr)))) 
           prs))

(def repo-counts 
  (frequencies (map :repo filtered-prs)))

(def total-count (count filtered-prs))

(def max-additions-pr 
  (apply max-key :additions filtered-prs))
